title: Add binary expression type checking for arrays

features.name: unpacked array bitwise or with scalar
features.description: Code should include a bitwise OR operation between a unpacked array and a scalar constant, where the LHS is a 2-bit output

features.name: unpacked array bitwise or with expression
features.description: Code should include a bitwise OR operation between a unpacked array and an addition expression involving an input port
features.snippet:
wire [1:0] arr [1:0];
assign o = arr | i + 1;
